Package io.cloudstub.core.download

Class ModuleDownloader

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.core.download.ModuleDownloader
public final class ModuleDownloader extends Object
Provisions a CloudStub service module jar from Maven Central into a plugin directory: fetch, checksum-verify, then store.

Modules are self-contained (compileOnly on core, no runtime transitive dependencies), so a single direct jar download per service is sufficient — this is not a transitive dependency resolver. The network surface is one fixed Central base URL; no arbitrary repositories.

Layout is handled by MavenModuleCoordinate, HTTP by HttpFetcher, integrity by ChecksumVerifier, and the plugin-directory cache by ModuleCache.

Instances are thread-safe.

    Field
    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • ModuleDownloader

      public ModuleDownloader()
      Creates a downloader that resolves from Maven Central.

    • ModuleDownloader

      public ModuleDownloader(String baseUrl)
      Creates a downloader resolving from baseUrl (a Maven repository layout root). Intended for pointing at a corporate mirror or, in tests, a local repository.
      Parameters:
      baseUrl - repository base URL; a trailing slash is tolerated

  • Method Details

    • isCached

      public static boolean isCached(Path dir, String service, String version)
      Returns whether the jar for service at version is present in dir — either the exact versioned jar or an unversioned cloudstub-<service>.jar. A jar of a different version is not a match.
      Parameters:
      dir - plugin directory to inspect; may be null
      service - service id (e.g. sqs)
      version - requested module version
      Returns:
      true if the requested version (or an unversioned jar) is present

    • cachedJar

      public static Path cachedJar(Path dir, String service)
      Returns a jar for service already present in dir at any version, regardless of which version was requested. Intended as a fallback when a download cannot reach the network: a previously provisioned (and at-download-time checksum-verified) jar is preferable to failing to start.
      Parameters:
      dir - plugin directory to inspect; may be null
      service - service id (e.g. sqs)
      Returns:
      the path of a cached jar for the service, or null if none is present

    • cachedJar

      public static Path cachedJar(Path dir, String service, String version)
      Returns the cached jar for service at exactly version (the versioned jar, or an unversioned cloudstub-<service>.jar), or null if that version is not cached. Unlike cachedJar(Path, String), a jar of a different version is not a match.
      Parameters:
      dir - plugin directory to inspect; may be null
      service - service id (e.g. sqs)
      version - requested module version
      Returns:
      the path of the cached jar for that exact version, or null if absent

    • download

      public Path download(String service, String version, Path dir)
      Downloads the module jar for service into dir, verifying its checksum before the file is made visible and pruning any other cached version.

      The exact version is fetched when published. When it is not (the common case under selective publishing, where an unchanged module is not re-released at every core version), the highest published version that is less than or equal to version is resolved from the artifact's maven-metadata.xml and fetched instead. A module already cached at the resolved version is reused rather than re-downloaded.

      Parameters:
      service - service id (e.g. sqs)
      version - requested module version (typically the running core version)
      dir - target plugin directory (created if absent)
      Returns:
      the path the jar was written to, or the cached path when the resolved version is already present
      Throws:
      ModuleDownloadException - with an actionable message on any failure
